title: Testing symbols for electric vehicle charging points
body: "This research tested the performance of 3 symbols to represent electric vehicle (EV) charging points on road traffic signs.  The research aimed to identify the symbol that:   was most accurately interpreted was most consistently remembered stood out best in visually busy contexts   It was conducted through an online experiment with 1,107 drivers living in England and 15 in-depth interviews.  Thinks Insight & Strategy conducted the report on behalf of DfT.  "
